mte_summary: New DME - Business Support User Bizagi Role (CCBA3) Functional and Regression Testing

test_cases.summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants Buyer Work Queue Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can execute the Buyer Work Queue (BPMS002) and perform case actions (re-assign, cancel, process) without viewing User Administration screens.
description.expected_result: User successfully opens BPMS002 Buyer Work Queue, selects a case, and performs re-assign/cancel actions. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Buyer Work Queue session (BPMS002) within the Bizagi interface
steps.expected_result: Buyer Work Queue screen loads successfully.

steps.action: Select a pending case from the queue and click on the case details
Attempt to perform the 'Re-assign' action on the selected case
Attempt to navigate to the User Administration screen (e.g., User Management) from the main menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied or screen not visible. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

test_cases.summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants Purchase Requisition Search Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can search for Purchase Requisitions (BPMS015) but cannot modify user data.
description.expected_result: User successfully searches for PRs in BPMS015 and views details. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Purchase Requisition search session (BPMS015)
Enter search criteria (e.g., Buyer, Date Range) and execute search
steps.expected_result: List of purchase requisitions displays correctly.

steps.action: Select a requisition from the list and view details
Attempt to access User Administration screens from the navigation menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants Purchase Order Search and Supplier Response Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can search for POs (BPMS058.1/058.2) and view Supplier Response (BPMS026) but cannot modify user data.
description.expected_result: User successfully searches for POs and views Supplier Response details. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Purchase Order search session (BPMS058.1)
Execute search for a specific PO number
Navigate to the Purchase Order Supplier Response session (BPMS026)
Verify that User Administration screens are inaccessible from the main menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants Inhouse Metals PO Create Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can create Inhouse metals POs (BPMS042.2) but cannot modify user data.
description.expected_result: User successfully creates an Inhouse metals PO in BPMS042.2. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Inhouse metals PO create session (BPMS042.2)
Maintain header and line details for a new Inhouse metals PO
Submit the PO for approval
Attempt to access User Administration screens from the navigation menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants BAM Reports Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can view BAM reports but cannot modify user data.
description.expected_result: User successfully views BAM reports. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Reports section and select a BAM report
Open a specific BAM report and verify data visibility
Attempt to access User Administration screens from the navigation menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants Admin Process Management Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can check cases in Admin Review and perform asynchronous actions (re-assign/cancel/process) but cannot modify user data.
description.expected_result: User successfully checks cases in Admin Review and performs re-assign/cancel actions. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Admin Process Management section and select Admin Review
Select a case from the Admin Review list and perform a re-assign action
Attempt to access User Administration screens from the navigation menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants Primary Signal Codes Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can view Primary Signal Codes (BPMS019) but cannot modify user data.
description.expected_result: User successfully views Primary Signal Codes in BPMS019. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Primary Signal Codes session (BPMS019)
Verify that signal codes are displayed correctly
Attempt to access User Administration screens from the navigation menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

summary: Functional: Verify CCBA3 Role Grants Re-send Exostar BOD Access

description.scenario: Validate that a user assigned to the new CCBA3 role can re-send Exostar BODs but cannot modify user data.
description.expected_result: User successfully re-sends an Exostar BOD. User cannot access User Administration screens.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the case management screen and locate a case requiring BOD re-send
Select the case and click the Re-send Exostar BOD action
Attempt to access User Administration screens from the navigation menu
steps.expected_result: Access denied. User cannot view or edit user administration screens.

summary: Regression: Verify Existing Happy Path for Buyer Work Queue (BPMS002) with CCBA3 Role

description.scenario: Ensure that the existing Buyer Work Queue process flow remains functional after the creation of the new CCBA3 role and migration of users from CCBA1/BZ01.
description.expected_result: User assigned to CCBA3 role can complete the full Buyer Work Queue flow (create case, select buyer, tick PRQ, transfer, next) without errors.

steps.action: Log in to Bizagi using credentials for a user assigned to the new AD Group ROLE-G-BAE-CCBA3-XXX
Navigate to the Buyer Work Queue session (BPMS002) and click New to create a case
Select the buyer for the case and tick the purchase requisition tick box
Click Next to proceed to the next stage of the workflow
steps.expected_result: Workflow advances to the next stage.

steps.action: Verify that the case is processed correctly and no errors occur
Verify that the user cannot access User Administration screens
steps.expected_result: Access denied to User Administration screens.

description.scenario: Ensure that the existing Purchase Requisition search functionality remains functional after the creation of the new CCBA3 role.

Navigate to the Purchase Requisition search session (BPMS015)
Enter search criteria (e.g., Buyer, Date Range) and execute search
steps.expected_result: List of purchase requisitions displays correctly.

steps.action: Select a requisition from the list and view details
Verify that the user cannot access User Administration screens
steps.expected_result: Access denied to User Administration screens.
